settings.title: Product Details
settings.text: One Size Fits All — Poly/Spandex Front (82% Polyester / 18% Spandex) — 100% Poly Mesh Back — Adjustable snapback closure — Tonal flat bill

settings.title: Fabric & Fit
settings.text: Foam-based structured front laminated with poly/spandex interlock. Breathable mesh back for ventilation. One size fits all with an adjustable snapback for a dialed-in fit.

settings.title: Care & Shipping
settings.text: Spot clean only — do not machine wash. Free shipping on orders over $75. 30-day returns, no questions asked.
